items.title_en: Kenya fuel prices rise sharply despite reduction in tax due to Iran war
items.title_zh: 尽管因伊朗战争而减税，肯尼亚燃油价格仍大幅上涨
items.desc_en: Diesel prices rise by a record margin despite a reduction in value added tax.
items.desc_zh: 尽管增值税减少，柴油价格仍以创纪录的幅度上涨。

items.title_en: Trump renews criticism of UK, saying it should ‘drill, baby, drill’ for North Sea oil
items.title_zh: 特朗普再次批评英国，称英国应该“钻探，宝贝，钻探”北海石油
items.desc_en: Trump's comments come at a time when the U.K. government has said the Iran war energy shock shows the need “to get off the fossil fuel rollercoaster.”
items.desc_zh: 特朗普发表此番言论之际，英国政府表示，伊朗战争对能源的冲击表明有必要“摆脱化石燃料的过山车”。

items.title_en: South Africa names apartheid-era politician as new ambassador to the US
items.title_zh: 南非任命种族隔离时代政治家为新驻美国大使
items.desc_en: Roelf Meyer played a key role as a negotiator during talks to end white-minority rule in South Africa.
items.desc_zh: 罗尔夫·迈耶在结束南非白人少数统治的谈判中作为谈判代表发挥了关键作用。

items.title_en: U.S. crude trades lower as possible Washington-Tehran talks raise hopes for Mideast peace deal
items.title_zh: 由于华盛顿与德黑兰的可能会谈增加了中东和平协议的希望，美国原油交易走低
items.desc_en: Oil prices traded mixed as optimism grew that Iran may restart negotiations with the U.S. and Israel, easing tensions over the conflict that has disrupted the Strait of Hormuz.
items.desc_zh: 由于伊朗可能重启与美国和以色列的谈判，从而缓解因霍尔木兹海峡冲突引发的紧张局势，油价涨跌互现。

items.title_en: Magyar meets Hungarian president as Trump says next PM 'a good man'
items.title_zh: 马扎尔会见匈牙利总统，特朗普称下一任总理是“好人”
items.desc_en: The man who ended Viktor Orbán's 16 years of continuous rule, Péter Magyar, is calling for a speedy transfer of power.
items.desc_zh: 结束维克托·欧尔班 16 年连续统治的人彼得·马扎尔 (Péter Magyar) 呼吁迅速移交权力。

items.title_en: Luxury stocks fall as Iran war weighs on earnings; Hermes sinks 14%
items.title_zh: 由于伊朗战争影响盈利，奢侈品股下跌；爱马仕下跌 14%
items.desc_en: Hermes said wholesale activity was "significantly affected" in the first quarter by lower sales to concession stores, particularly in the Middle East and in airports.
items.desc_zh: 爱马仕表示，第一季度批发活动受到特许商店销售额下降的“严重影响”，特别是在中东和机场。

items.title_en: Australian pleads guilty to creating deepfake porn in landmark case
items.title_zh: 澳大利亚人承认在具有里程碑意义的案件中制作深度伪造色情内容
items.desc_en: The 19-year-old is the first person to be charged under a new national law.
items.desc_zh: 这位 19 岁的男子是第一个根据新的国家法律受到指控的人。

items.desc_en: It comes a week after the UK announced it would block the rapper from entering the country, where he was due to headline a music festival in summer.

items.title_en: Why Wells Fargo says it might be time to take profits on energy — even as the bank hikes its oil price forecasts
